name: GrantFlow Discovery
description: Autonomous grant discovery and submission pipeline service. Searches Grants.gov for relevant opportunities, matches them against researcher profiles, manages the application pipeline, and emits Extropy Engine claims for each entropy-reducing action.

capabilities.name: Autonomous Grant Discovery
capabilities.description: Periodic search of Grants.gov REST API for open and forecasted grant opportunities matching researcher profile keywords

capabilities.name: Grant-Profile Matching
capabilities.description: Computes match scores (0-100) between discovered grants and researcher profiles based on keyword overlap, domain alignment, and award amount fit

capabilities.name: Submission Pipeline Management
capabilities.description: Tracks application lifecycle from discovered → researching → drafting → review → submitted → awarded/declined

capabilities.name: Grants.gov S2S SOAP Submission
capabilities.description: Prepares SF-424 XML packages and submits applications via Grants.gov System-to-System SOAP API (requires AOR credentials)

capabilities.name: Extropy Engine Claim Emission
capabilities.description: Generates and submits claims to the Epistemology Engine for each grant lifecycle event, opening verification loops for XP minting

publishedEvents.description: Emitted when a grant discovery or submission action triggers a new Extropy Engine claim

subscribedEvents.description: Handles tasks routed by SignalFlow for informational and economic domain validation
Updates local claim status when a verification loop closes with ΔS > 0
Records XP mint value against the corresponding claim record

apiEndpoints.description: Health check — returns service status, scheduler state, and dependencies
HTTP webhook for receiving Extropy Engine domain events
Service info — returns all endpoints and capabilities
Create a new researcher profile
List all researcher profiles
Get a specific researcher profile by UUID
Partially update a researcher profile
Delete a researcher profile
List cached grant opportunities from the database
Get a single grant opportunity by internal UUID
Compute match score between an opportunity and a profile
List all grant-profile matches above the minimum score threshold
Get top N matches for a specific profile
Create a new submission pipeline entry
List submissions with optional filtering
Get a single submission by UUID
Update submission status in the pipeline
Prepare an S2S XML package for Grants.gov SOAP submission
Request proposal generation from grantflow-proposer service
Submit application to Grants.gov via S2S SOAP (requires GRANTS_GOV_S2S_USER/PASS)
Trigger a manual Grants.gov search
Get search run history (scheduled + manual cycles)
Get scheduler status (active, lastRunAt, nextRunAt)
Manually trigger a full discovery cycle (search → match → claim)
Start the automated discovery scheduler
Stop the automated discovery scheduler

externalApis.name: Grants.gov S2S SOAP API v2
externalApis.note: Required for actual application submission. Credentials are optional — service functions without them for discovery and matching.

defaultProfile.name: Randall Gossett
defaultProfile.note: Pre-populated at service startup via profileService.ensureDefaultProfile()
